name: change-request
description: New change request from a client (auto-applied by issue template)

name: in-progress
description: Upriver bot has started work on this issue

name: awaiting-assets
description: Bot is paused waiting on a missing photo, PDF, or other asset from the client

name: pending-review
description: PR is open and ready for the operator to review

name: voice-check-failed
description: Generated change failed the voice check; operator review required before merge
